title: MJ: Ender Pearl Staff
description: Adds a new Ender Pearl Staff to teleport to other players and back home!
body:
# Modding Journeys: Ender Pearl Staff

Adds a new Ender Pearl Staff crafted from sticks, amethyst shards, and an ender pearl! Using the staff costs 1 XP Level to teleport the user to another player on the server, and using it while sneaking will return you home!
